description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the registry.gitlab.com/taichunmin/docker-compose-git:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Define a single stage called docker. Add a build-docker job that runs in the docker stage, uses the docker tag, performs a before_script to log in to $CI_REGISTRY with $CI_REGISTRY_USER and $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD, then runs docker-compose -f docker-build.yml build, docker-compose -f docker-build.yml push, and docker-compose -f docker-build.yml down --rmi all. The job is restricted to runners tagged with docker.
